title: Self-Organization and Collective Bargaining. All Filipino seafarers who
content: 23 are engaged, employed, or who work in any capacity on board a ship or vessel whether 24 Philippine-registered or foreign-registered, shall have the right to self-organization and to 25 form, join or assist in the formation of a labor organization of their own choosing for 26 purposes of collective bargaining, in accordance with the provisions of the R.A. No. 12021 27 and its IRR. 28 29 The shipowner shall provide the seafarer a copy of the CBA, whether digital or printed, 30 which must be readily available and accessible and, upon proper request, furnish the 31 seafarer. Provided, that the DMW shall require shipowners, through the manning 32 agencies, to submit a copy of any CBA executed overseas. 33 34
